zh.lifeSummary: 當John Harvey於1405年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾瑟利時，他的父親John Hervey III45歲，母親Margaret Parles Hervey37歲。他於1430年與Joan Niernuyt在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1475年在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾貝德福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Harvey于1405年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾瑟利时，他的父亲John Hervey III45岁，母亲Margaret Parles Hervey37岁。他于1430年与Joan Niernuyt在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1475年在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰貝德福爾貝德福德。

nameMeanings.name: Harvey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French and Middle English personal name Hervei, also found as Herveu, Hervé, and Hervi. The name Herveu or Herv(e)i was borne by a number of Bretons at the Norman Conquest and, as such, represents a French form of the Old Breton name Hoiearnviu or Hærviu (see Herve ). Among Normans Herve(i) or Herv(e)i was also a French form of ancient Germanic Hariwic, Herewic (from hari ‘army’ + wīg ‘war’), with intervocalic /w/ becoming /v/ in Old French. The Breton and ancient Germanic names were commonly Latinized as Herve(i)us and Hervic(i)us respectively but, since their most common vernacular forms in Old French were indistinguishable, the Latin forms were also sometimes interchangeable, especially Herveus.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAirmheadhaigh ‘descendant of Airmheadhach’, a personal name probably meaning ‘esteemed’. It seems to be a derivative of Airmheadh, the name borne by a mythological physician.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchaidh ‘descendant of Earchadh’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Herve
meanings: Breton (Hervé): from the Old Breton personal name Hoiearnviu, composed of the elements hoiarn ‘iron’ and viu ‘blazing’, or Hærviu, with the first element meaning ‘battle’ or ‘fort’.
French (Hervé): from the ancient Germanic personal name Hariwig, composed of the elements hari ‘army’ and wig ‘battle’. Compare Harvey .

variants.name: Hervey
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Harvey  .

variants.name: Havey
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Harvey  , although some instances in the historical records may be spelling errors.

variants.name: Harvison
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): patronymic from the personal name   Harvey   + ‘son’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Harvey was born in 1405, in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Hervey III, was 45 and his mother, Margaret Parles Hervey, was 37. He married Joan Niernuyt in 1430, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1475, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Harvey est né en 1405, à Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Hervey III, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Margaret Parles Hervey, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Joan Niernuyt en 1430, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1475, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Harvey 1405 in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Hervey III 45 und seine Mutter Margaret Parles Hervey 37. Er hat 1430 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Joan Niernuyt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1475 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Harvey è nato il nel 1405 nel Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Hervey III, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Parles Hervey, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Joan Niernuyt nel 1430, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1475, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Harveyが1405年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアスウルレイグで生まれた時，父John Hervey IIIは45歳，母Margaret Parles Herveyは37歳であった。1430年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでJoan Niernuytと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1475年に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアベドフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Harvey(이)가 1405년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hervey III(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Parles Hervey(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Joan Niernuyt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1475년 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Harvey nasceu em 1405, em Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Hervey III, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Parles Hervey, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Niernuyt em 1430, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1475, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Harvey родился в 1405 г. в местности турлиг, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Hervey III было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Parles Hervey, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Niernuyt в 1430 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1475 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Harvey nació en 1405, en Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Hervey III, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Margaret Parles Hervey, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Joan Niernuyt en 1430, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1475, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
